prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to scotland and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: This document pertains specifically to the Trade Union and Labour Relations (Consolidation) Act 1992, which is applicable to England and Wales. It does not apply to Scotland, as Scotland has its own distinct labor laws and regulatory framework regarding trade unions and collective bargaining.
